label: pid_tuning_issue
topic_title: Roll and pitch oscillations then crash
expert_quote: Well, I still worry about your motor mounting. While it may seem “stiff” in a static situation on the bench, what you get dynamically when it’s flying is usually different. If the motors are not staying in their static alignment once the aircraft is airborne, it will cause undesirable flight characteristics. So I would keep that in mind if nothing else works. You are using Pixhawk, and I am using APM2.8 clone board w
